rain.light: Light rain expected around {hours}. You might want a jacket ☔
rain.moderate: Rain coming at {hours}. Good time to finish outdoor things 🌧️
rain.heavy: Heavy rain at {hours}. Stay dry, maybe make tea? 🌧️☕
rain.torrential: Downpour incoming at {hours}. Perfect excuse to stay in 🏠

storm.default: Thunderstorm approaching. Unplug electronics, stay safe ⚡

heat.default: Heat wave building. Hydrate, shade, take it slow 💧

freeze.default: Temperatures dropping near freezing. Protect plants, pipes 🌡️
